features: Ergonomic Design & Strong Grip:Features a comfortable C-shaped handle with anti-slip texture for precise control. The angled neck easily accesses back teeth, reducing hand strain during use while ensuring thorough plaque removal between tight spaces.

Durable Floss & Gentle Cleaning:Ultra-strong PTFE floss resists shredding and snaps, gliding smoothly between teeth without irritating gums. Effectively removes trapped food and plaque below the gumline for healthier teeth and fresher breath daily.

Travel-Ready & Hygienic:Individually wrapped picks maintain hygiene on-the-go. Compact, lightweight design fits in pockets, purses, or travel kits‚Äîideal for office, school, or trips. Always have fresh floss available anytime, anywhere.
Safety Materials:Crafted with BPA-free plastic and latex-free floss for sensitive users.Hypoallergenic materials ensure safe, gentle use for all ages without skin irritation.
Great Value Bulk Pack:Lasting months of daily use. Cost-effective alternative to single-use floss. Saves money while promoting consistent oral care habits for the whole family‚Äôs dental health.
